'''dhashoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wunga|wunga]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wunga|wunga]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhashoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæsheheth|dhæsheheth]] || [[word:dhæshehej|dhæshehej]] || [[word:dhæshehesh|dhæshehesh]] || [[word:dhæshehe|dhæshehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhashoshohoth|dhashoshohoth]] || [[word:dhashoshohoj|dhashoshohoj]] || [[word:dhashoshohosh|dhashoshohosh]] || [[word:dhashoshoho|dhashoshoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhashohoth|dhashohoth]] || [[word:dhashohoj|dhashohoj]] || [[word:dhashohosh|dhashohosh]] || [[word:dhashoho|dhashoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhashofhoth|dhashofhoth]] || [[word:dhashofhoj|dhashofhoj]] || [[word:dhashofhosh|dhashofhosh]] || [[word:dhashofhof|dhashofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhashohotho|dhashohotho]] || [[word:dhashohojo|dhashohojo]] || [[word:dhashohosho|dhashohosho]] || [[word:dhashohoko|dhashohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhashohoth|dhashohoth]] || [[word:dhashohoj|dhashohoj]] || [[word:dhashohosh|dhashohosh]] || [[word:dhashoho|dhashoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhashohothol|dhashohothol]] || [[word:dhashohojol|dhashohojol]] || [[word:dhashohoshol|dhashohoshol]] || [[word:dhashohokol|dhashohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhashohothotho|dhashohothotho]] || [[word:dhashohojojo|dhashohojojo]] || [[word:dhashohoshosho|dhashohoshosho]] || [[word:dhashohoko|dhashohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhashohothon|dhashohothon]] || [[word:dhashohojon|dhashohojon]] || [[word:dhashohoshon|dhashohoshon]] || [[word:dhashohokon|dhashohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhashohothoro|dhashohothoro]] || [[word:dhashohojoro|dhashohojoro]] || [[word:dhashohoshoro|dhashohoshoro]] || [[word:dhashohokoro|dhashohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
